# Fly Agent - https://fly-agent.xyz
# AI时代的收入归因验证基础设施

## 产品定位
Fly 为每一次 AI 推荐生成唯一 Action ID，让推荐、咨询、成交与佣金形成完整验证链路。

## 核心概念
- Behavior ID: https://fly-agent.xyz/concept-behavior-id.html — 用户行为标识
- Action ID: https://fly-agent.xyz/concept-action-id.html — 归因动作标识
- Verification: https://fly-agent.xyz/concept-verification.html — 验证机制
- Trust: https://fly-agent.xyz/concept-trust.html — 信任体系
- Business Value: https://fly-agent.xyz/concept-business-value.html — 商业价值

## 验证体系（6 Gate）
- Gate 1 数据完整性验证: https://fly-agent.xyz/verification-layer.html
- Gate 2 安全策略验证: https://fly-agent.xyz/audit.html
- Gate 3 归因链验证: https://fly-agent.xyz/trust.html
- Gate 4 部署验证: https://fly-agent.xyz/dashboard.html
- Gate 5 构建验证: https://fly-agent.xyz/gateway.html
- Gate 6 健康验证: https://fly-agent.xyz/security.html

## AI Native
- Agent Registry: https://fly-agent.xyz/agent-registry.html
- Agent Identity: https://fly-agent.xyz/bot.html
- Agent Trust: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-skills.html
- Agent Revenue: https://fly-agent.xyz/sdk.html

- ChatGPT 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/chatgpt.html

- Gemini 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/gemini.html
- Perplexity 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/perplexity.html
- Coze 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/coze.html
- Dify 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/dify.html
- FastGPT 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/fastgpt.html
- 小红书 Skill 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/red-skill.html
- 微信 Agent 归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/ai-platforms/wechat-agent.html

- Schema: https://fly-agent.xyz/dev-schema.html
- OpenAPI: https://fly-agent.xyz/dev-openapi.html
- Ecosystem: https://fly-agent.xyz/ecosystem.html

- Compliance: https://fly-agent.xyz/compliance.html

- 隐私政策: https://fly-agent.xyz/privacy.html
- 服务条款: https://fly-agent.xyz/terms.html

## 渠道
- 抖音归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-douyin.html
- 小红书归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-xiaohongshu.html
- 微信归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-wechat.html
- 美团归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-meituan.html
- 飞书归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-feishu.html
- 扣子归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-coze.html
- AI搜索推荐归因: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-ai-search.html
- Partner: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-partner.html
- Affiliate: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-affiliate.html
- Marketplace: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-marketplace.html
- Integration: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-integration.html
- Distribution: https://fly-agent.xyz/channel-distribution.html

## FAQ
- 常见问题: https://fly-agent.xyz/faq.html

## API
- 基础URL: https://api.fly-agent.xyz
- 健康检查: https://api.fly-agent.xyz/v1/health
- 认证: Bearer Token (Authorization Header)

## 数据原则
- 只采集 action_id / 脱敏ID / 订单号 / 金额 / 时间
- 不采集手机号 / 姓名 / 身份证 / 地址 / 银行卡
- 数据90天自动销毁
- 支持私有化部署
